homepage.heroSubline: Durable, energy-efficient skylight solutions for Northeast Ohio homes. Expert installation & repair.
aboutText: Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions was founded over a decade ago by lifelong Cleveland residents who saw a need for specialized skylight services. We understand the unique challenges our local climate poses to skylights and windows, from harsh winters to humid summers.

Our approach is simple: provide honest assessments, quality workmanship, and lasting results. We prioritize clear communication and treat every home as if it were our own. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind our work.
We're committed to serving the Cleveland community, and we're proud to support local organizations. We believe in giving back to the neighborhoods that have supported us.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a free consultation and discover the difference skylights can make.

services.name: Skylight Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional skylight installation for enhanced natural light and energy efficiency.
services.description:
Installing a skylight is more than just cutting a hole in your roof; it's about carefully integrating a new element into your home that enhances its beauty, value, and energy efficiency. Our team starts with a thorough assessment of your home's structure and your specific needs, taking into account factors like roof pitch, sun exposure, and room layout. We offer a wide range of skylight options, from fixed skylights to venting skylights, and we'll help you choose the perfect style and size for your space.

Our installation process is meticulous, ensuring a weatherproof seal and proper flashing to prevent leaks. We use only high-quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure a long-lasting and trouble-free installation. We handle all aspects of the project, from framing and drywall to painting and finishing touches. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your home during the installation process, and we'll work efficiently and respectfully to complete the project on time and within budget.

With professional skylight installation, you can enjoy the benefits of natural light, improved ventilation, and increased home value for years to come. Let us transform your home with the beauty and functionality of skylights.
process: Step 1: Initial consultation and assessment of your home's needs.
Step 2: Selection of the appropriate skylight style and size.
Step 3: Professional installation, including framing, flashing, and sealing.
Step 4: Interior finishing and cleanup.

faq.question: How long does skylight installation typically take?
faq.answer: Most installations can be completed in one to two days, depending on the complexity of the project.

faq.question: Will a skylight cause leaks in my roof?
faq.answer: With proper installation and flashing, a skylight should not leak. Our experienced installers ensure a watertight seal.

faq.question: What type of skylight is best for my home?
faq.answer: The best type of skylight depends on your specific needs and preferences. We can help you choose the right skylight based on factors like room location, sun exposure, and desired functionality.

services.name: Skylight Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert skylight repair services to address leaks, cracks, and other damages.
services.description:
Skylights, while beautiful and functional, are vulnerable to the elements, especially in Cleveland's harsh climate. Leaks, cracks, and condensation are common issues that can compromise the integrity of your skylight and potentially damage your home. Our skylight repair services are designed to address these problems quickly and effectively, preventing further damage and restoring your skylight to its optimal condition.

We begin with a thorough inspection to identify the source of the problem and assess the extent of the damage. Whether it's a simple resealing job or a more complex repair involving replacing damaged glass or flashing, we have the expertise to handle it. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a lasting repair that will protect your home from the elements.

We understand that a leaking skylight can be a major headache, which is why we offer prompt and reliable service. Our team will work efficiently to minimize disruption to your home and get your skylight back in top shape as quickly as possible. Don't let a damaged skylight compromise your home's comfort and value; contact us today for expert skylight repair services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection to identify the source of the problem.
Step 2: Detailed assessment of the damage and recommended repair solutions.
Step 3: Professional repair using high-quality materials.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure a watertight seal and proper functionality.

faq.question: How do I know if my skylight needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of skylight damage include leaks, condensation, cracks, and discoloration. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to contact us for an inspection.

faq.question: Can I repair a skylight myself?
faq.answer: While some minor repairs may be possible for homeowners, it's generally best to leave skylight repairs to the professionals. Improper repairs can lead to further damage and potential leaks.

faq.question: How much does skylight repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of skylight repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of repair needed. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate before starting any work.

services.name: Skylight Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your old or damaged skylight with our professional replacement services.
services.description:
If your skylight is old, damaged beyond repair, or simply not performing as it should, a skylight replacement may be the best solution. We offer a wide selection of high-quality skylights from leading manufacturers, and our experienced team can help you choose the perfect replacement for your home. We'll take into account factors like energy efficiency, aesthetics, and budget to find a skylight that meets your needs.

Our skylight replacement process is efficient and hassle-free. We'll carefully remove your old skylight and install the new one with precision and attention to detail. We'll ensure a watertight seal and proper flashing to prevent leaks, and we'll handle all aspects of the project, from framing to finishing touches. With a new skylight, you can enjoy improved energy efficiency, enhanced natural light, and increased home value.

We understand that replacing a skylight can be a significant investment, which is why we offer competitive pricing and flexible financing options. We're committed to providing our customers with the best possible value and a seamless replacement experience. Upgrade your home with a new skylight and experience the difference it can make.
process: Step 1: Consultation and selection of a new skylight.
Step 2: Removal of the old skylight.
Step 3: Professional installation of the new skylight.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup.

faq.question: How long does skylight replacement take?
faq.answer: Most skylight replacements can be completed in one day.

faq.question: What are the benefits of replacing my old skylight?
faq.answer: Replacing an old skylight can improve energy efficiency, reduce drafts, and enhance the overall look of your home.

faq.question: How much does skylight replacement cost?
faq.answer: The cost of skylight replacement depends on the type of skylight and the complexity of the installation. We'll provide you with a free estimate.

services.name: Sun Tunnel Installation
services.shortDescription: Bring natural light to dark spaces with our professional sun tunnel installation services.
services.description:
Sun tunnels, also known as tubular skylights, are a great way to bring natural light into rooms that don't have access to traditional skylights. These innovative lighting solutions consist of a small dome on the roof that captures sunlight and a reflective tube that channels the light down into the room below. Sun tunnels are perfect for hallways, bathrooms, closets, and other interior spaces that need a boost of natural light.

Our sun tunnel installation services are designed to provide you with a seamless and hassle-free experience. We'll start by assessing your home and determining the best location for the sun tunnel. We'll then carefully install the dome on the roof and connect it to the reflective tube. Finally, we'll install the diffuser in the ceiling to distribute the light evenly throughout the room. With a sun tunnel, you can enjoy the benefits of natural light without the need for extensive remodeling.

Sun tunnels are energy-efficient, cost-effective, and easy to maintain. They can significantly reduce your reliance on artificial lighting, saving you money on your energy bills. Plus, they add a touch of natural beauty to any room. Contact us today to learn more about our sun tunnel installation services.
process: Step 1: Assessment of your home and selection of the appropriate sun tunnel size.
Step 2: Installation of the dome on the roof.
Step 3: Connection of the reflective tube.
Step 4: Installation of the diffuser in the ceiling.

faq.question: What is a sun tunnel?
faq.answer: A sun tunnel is a tubular skylight that brings natural light into interior spaces.

faq.question: Where can sun tunnels be installed?
faq.answer: Sun tunnels can be installed in hallways, bathrooms, closets, and other interior rooms.

faq.question: How much does sun tunnel installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of sun tunnel installation depends on the size of the sun tunnel and the complexity of the installation. We'll provide you with a free estimate.

services.name: Skylight Leak Detection
services.shortDescription: Accurate leak detection services to identify and resolve skylight leaks quickly.
services.description:
A leaking skylight can cause significant damage to your home, from water stains on your ceiling to mold growth and structural damage. That's why it's crucial to address skylight leaks quickly and effectively. Our skylight leak detection services are designed to identify the source of the leak and provide you with a comprehensive solution.

We use advanced techniques and equipment to pinpoint the exact location of the leak, even if it's not immediately visible. Our experienced technicians will carefully inspect your skylight, flashing, and surrounding roof area to identify any signs of damage or deterioration. Once we've found the source of the leak, we'll provide you with a detailed report and recommend the best course of action.

Whether it's a simple resealing job or a more complex repair involving replacing flashing or damaged glass, we have the expertise to handle it. We're committed to providing our customers with prompt, reliable, and affordable leak detection services. Don't let a skylight leak compromise your home's comfort and value; contact us today for expert leak detection services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of the skylight and surrounding area.
Step 2: Use of advanced techniques and equipment to pinpoint the leak.
Step 3: Detailed report and recommended solutions.
Step 4: Professional repair or replacement services.

faq.question: Why is it important to address skylight leaks quickly?
faq.answer: Skylight leaks can cause significant damage to your home, including water stains, mold growth, and structural damage.

faq.question: How do you detect skylight leaks?
faq.answer: We use advanced techniques and equipment to pinpoint the exact location of the leak, even if it's not immediately visible.

faq.question: How much does skylight leak detection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of skylight leak detection depends on the complexity of the inspection. We'll provide you with a free estimate.

services.name: Skylight Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your skylights in top condition with our professional maintenance services.
services.description:
Regular skylight maintenance is essential for ensuring the longevity and performance of your skylights. Over time, skylights can accumulate dirt, debris, and algae, which can reduce the amount of natural light they let in. Additionally, seals can deteriorate, leading to leaks and drafts. Our skylight maintenance services are designed to address these issues and keep your skylights in top condition.

We offer a comprehensive range of maintenance services, including cleaning, resealing, and inspection. Our experienced technicians will carefully clean your skylights to remove dirt and debris, ensuring maximum light transmission. We'll also inspect the seals and flashing for any signs of damage or deterioration and make any necessary repairs. With regular skylight maintenance, you can protect your investment and enjoy the benefits of natural light for years to come.

We recommend scheduling skylight maintenance at least once a year, especially in Cleveland's harsh climate. Our maintenance services are affordable, convenient, and designed to minimize disruption to your home. Contact us today to schedule your skylight maintenance appointment.
process: Step 1: Thorough cleaning of the skylight glass.
Step 2: Inspection of the seals and flashing.
Step 3: Resealing of any damaged areas.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup.

faq.question: How often should I schedule skylight maintenance?
faq.answer: We recommend scheduling skylight maintenance at least once a year.

faq.question: What does skylight maintenance include?
faq.answer: Skylight maintenance includes cleaning, resealing, and inspection.

faq.question: How much does skylight maintenance cost?
faq.answer: The cost of skylight maintenance depends on the size and number of skylights. We'll provide you with a free estimate.

As a leading provider in the region, we understand the unique architectural styles and weather conditions that impact skylight performance in this vibrant city. reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions installed two new skylights in our West Park home, and we couldn't be happier. The team was professional, efficient, and the installation was flawless. Our living room is so much brighter now! Highly recommend.

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We had a persistent leak around our skylight after the winter freeze. Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions came out quickly, diagnosed the problem, and fixed it efficiently. They were upfront about the cost and the repair was done well. Good, solid work.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: I had a dark hallway that needed some light. Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions suggested and installed a sun tunnel. It's incredible! The hallway is now bright and welcoming. The installation team was courteous and cleaned up everything afterwards.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Our old skylight was cracked and drafty. Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions replaced it with a new, energy-efficient model. What a difference! The house feels warmer, and the new skylight looks great. The crew was punctual and professional.

reviews.name: Linda S.
reviews.text: We've used Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions for annual skylight maintenance for the past 3 years. They are reliable, thorough, and keep our skylights clean and functioning properly. It's a worthwhile investment to prevent problems down the road.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I suspected a leak, but couldn't find it. Northern Ohio Skylight Solutions used their specialized equipment to locate the source of the leak quickly. They were professional and knowledgeable. I recommend their leak detection service.
